title: Lonely World
description: A quiet, harder take on vanilla survival. Long days, no surface mobs, and a world that feels truly lonely, almost unsettling.
body:
Lonely World is a survival-focused pack built around Distant Horizons, shaders, and small but meaningful vanilla-style mods. There are no aggresive vanilla surface mobs (except for in dark places), but survival is tougher with hunger, thirst, temperature, and longer days and nights. Farming, cooking, and building are expanded with Create and Farmer’s Delight, while immersive sounds and seasons make the world feel bigger, harsher, and more alive.

Warning: This modpack can be unforgiving, forcing you to create perhaps multiple worlds to find a hospitable place to start.
